Avoidant Weave (Basic).name: Avoidant Weave (Basic)
Avoidant Weave (Basic).description:
Modification d'objet (vêtements)

Ce vêtement acquiert la propriété d'armure évitant 1. S'il possède déjà la propriété d'armure évitante, son numéro d'évitant augmente de 1, jusqu'à un maximum de 3.

Automated Adrenal Package.name: Automated Adrenal Package
Automated Adrenal Package.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

Prerequisite: Constitution 15

Once on your turn, you can activate this implant to gain the effects of an adrenal (no action required). Cet effet lasts for one minute, or until a different adrenal is chosen. Vous pouvez choisir from the following types of adrenals:

_

  • Strength Adrenal: You gain a +1 bonus to the jet de dégâtss of attaque d'arme au corps à corpss, and your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. If it would already double, it instead triples.
  • Alacrity Adrenal: You gain a +1 bonus to the jet de dégâtss of attaque d'arme à distances, and your speed increases by 10 mètres.
  • Stamina Adrenal: You gain 2 points de vie temporaires and a +2 bonus to Constitution jet de sauvegardes.

Side Effect: You can no longer benefit from other adrenals.

This clear plasti-polymer implant has an appearance vaguely resembling a multi-limbed cephalopod, and must be carefully installed by a master cybertech. It attaches by wrapping around the medulla, and produces a variety of combat adrenals for its user's consumption. It also performs blood-cleansing work to reduce the liver dégâts (for species that have a liver) caused by long-term adrenal use.

Quick-Fingered Pattern (Elite).name: Quick-Fingered Pattern (Elite)
Quick-Fingered Pattern (Elite).description:

Responsive Shielding Mk I.description:

Ostrine Edge (Deadly).description:

Repelling Cycler (Flawless).description:
Item Modification (Focus Generator)

This item gains the repelling property, but the DD to interrupt or dispel your powers is equal to 10 + the power's niveau, or 8 + twice your bonus de maîtrise + your casting modificateur for that power, whichever is greater. De plus, creatures always have disavantage on test de caractéristiques to dispel or interrupt your powers, and when a creatures make an test de caractéristique to dispel or interrupt your powers with disavantage, they must reroll one of the dice once (your choice).

Uncanniness Motivator.name: Uncanniness Motivator
Uncanniness Motivator.description:
Droid Customization (Protocol)

Prerequisite: Class III droid

When you or a creature you can see that can see and understand you makes an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde, you can roll a [[/r d4]] and add it to their roll (no action required). You can use this before or after the roll, but before the GM determines the roll's outcome. Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

Versatile Handle.name: Versatile Handle
Versatile Handle.description:
Item Modification (Lightweapon)

Prerequisite: Lacks double or two-handed property

This weapon gains the versatile ([[/r 1d10]]) property. If it already has the versatile property, the versatile dégâts increases by one step (from [[/r 2d4]] to [[/r d10]], [[/r d10]] to [[/r d12]], from [[/r d12]] to [[/r 2d6]], or from [[/r 2d6]] to [[/r 3d4]]).

Withercasting Channel (Mastery).name: Withercasting Channel (Mastery)

Detachable Eye.name: Detachable Eye
Detachable Eye.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

This augmentation replaces an eye.

As an action, you can remove or replace this eye. While removed, the eye sprouts eight small legs, has a speed of 15 mètres, an AC of 10, and 1 point de vie. As an action on each of your turns, you can move the eye up to its speed as long as it is within 30 mètres of you. You can see through both the detached eye and your remaining eye at the same time, or you can use your action to see through only one eye or the other.

Side Effect: While the eye is removed, you have disavantage on Intelligence (Investigation) and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight beyond 5 mètres.

This eye replacement is a favored tool for the augmented spy.

Guardian Offensive Augment.name: Guardian Offensive Augment
Guardian Offensive Augment.description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Prerequisite: At least 3 niveaus in guardian

The dégâts die for your Focused Strike die and Improved Force-Empowered Strikes features increases by one step (from [[/r d8]] to [[/r d10]], or [[/r d10]] to [[/r d12]]).

Dexterity Augment (Superior).name: Dexterity Augment (Superior)
Dexterity Augment (Superior).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Dextérité augmente de 1 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 1.

Intelligence Augment (Superior).name: Intelligence Augment (Superior)

Silver-Tongued Pattern (Basic).name: Silver-Tongued Pattern (Basic)

Hidden Compartment Blaster.name: Hidden Compartment Blaster
Hidden Compartment Blaster.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

This implant includes a small hidden blaster that is completely shielded and hidden from unenhanced investigation. You cannot use this hidden blaster until it is revealed. As a action bonus, you can reveal this weapon and make a single attaque d'arme à distance with it. You have maîtrise with this weapon for this attack. It deals [[/r 1d4]] energy dégâts on a hit, has a range of 20/60, and the light and reload 4 properties.

Side Effect: Reloading this weapon takes longer than usual. You can reload and re-conceal this weapon over one hour, which can be done during a repos court. This hidden compartment can only fit the specific blaster with which it is paired.

This augmentation hides a weapon in its wearer's forearm that is almost completely undetectable by modern sensors.

Impermeable Inlay (Fine).name: Impermeable Inlay (Fine)

Nagai Edge (Basic).description:

When you have avantage on an attack roll you make with this weapon, get the same result on both dice rolls, and hit, you deal one additional weapon die worth of dégâts.

Sentinel Offensive Augment.description:

Seeking Subroutine.name: Seeking Subroutine
Seeking Subroutine.description:
Item Modification (Wristpad)

If you miss with a pouvoir technique that calls for an attack roll, you can spend 2 tech points to reroll the attack. You must use the new roll.

You can only spend a number of tech points in this way equal to your bonus de maîtrise. You regain the ability to do so when you complete a repos long.

You can use Seeking Subroutine even if you have already used a different Subroutine modificatio during the casting of the power.

Intuitive Facial Prosthesis.name: Intuitive Facial Prosthesis
Intuitive Facial Prosthesis.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

This augmentation replaces your face.

Your Intelligence score becomes 13. If your Intelligence score is already equal to or greater than 13, it has no effect on you. De plus, you can add half your bonus de maîtrise (rounded down) to any test d'Intelligence you make that doesn't already include your bonus de maîtrise.

Side Effect: When you roll a 1 an Intelligence jet de sauvegarde, the implant stutters, causing any test de caractéristiques in which you are proficient you make before the start of your next turn to not include your bonus de maîtrise.

This facial prosthetic includes a solid state drive, allowing for quick recall.

Iridonian Grav-lev Arm.name: Iridonian Grav-lev Arm
Iridonian Grav-lev Arm.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

Prerequisite: Constitution 13

This augmentation replaces a hand.

Your unarmed strikes with this arm deal [[/r 1d4]] ion dégâts, and your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. If it would already double, it instead triples. De plus, you deal double dégâts to energy-based structures with your unarmed strikes.

Side Effect: You can no longer wield weapons with electronic components, such as blasters, vibroweapons, or lightweapons. De plus, if this hand interacts with a small electronic device, such as a datapad or commlink, it is immediately disabled.

This cybernetic arm replacement increases a user's physical strength and can be overloaded to release a unique field resonance discharge that is particularly effective against containment fields and makes holding on to hydrospanners a breeze.

Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

This augmentation replaces an arm.

When you make an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength using only this arm, your Strength score is treated as 15. When you make an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength using more than just this arm, you take the average of the arm's Strength score and your own.

Side Effect: When you roll a 1 on an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength with this arm, it seizes up, becoming unusable jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

These arm replacements are popular with the less exercise-inclined.

Survival and Surveillance Implant.name: Implant de survie et de surveillance
Survival and Surveillance Implant.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

Prerequisite: Intelligence 13

This augmentation replaces your eyes and face.

This implant contains several tools for long-term survival and reconnaissance. As a action bonus, you can activate one of the below modes that enable you to use several of these tools at once. Only one mode can be active at a time.

_

  • Communications Mode: This communications suite includes a headcomm with a scrambler that automatically encodes messages sent to a specified recipient commlink or receiver. While this mode is active, you cannot be assourdi.
  • Interceptor Mode: This is a jamming and electronic warfare suite that includes a comm jammer, a holotrace device and pocket scrambler.
  • Respirator Mode: This includes a basic respirator that grants avantage on jet de sauvegardes made to avoid being empoisonné and resistance to poison dégâts.

Side Effect: This complex interface causes significant interference with other communication devices, rendering them impossible to use. While this implant is installed, you can not use any portable device used for communication or jamming, such as a commlink or holotrace device.

Frequently used by scouts and corporate espionage specialists, this imposing implant covers nearly the entire left half of the face, and includes a series of tools for long-term survival in hostile conditions.

Neutronium Edge (Major).name: Neutronium Edge (Major)
Neutronium Edge (Major).description:
Item Modification (Vibroweapon)

You gain a +2 bonus to jet de dégâtss made with this weapon.

Fadecasting Processor (Dueling).name: Fadecasting Processor (Dueling)
Fadecasting Processor (Dueling).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

En utilisant cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +2 au DD de sauvegarde technologique des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Force ou de Constitution.

High-Grade Cybernetic Arm.name: High-Grade Cybernetic Arm
High-Grade Cybernetic Arm.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

Prerequisite: Constitution 13

This augmentation replaces an arm.

Quand vous contactez avec a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength with a weapon wielded by this arm, you gain a +1 bonus to the jet de dégâts. De plus, quand vous faites a Strength (Athletics) check that involves this arm, you gain a +1 bonus to the check.

Side Effect: You have disavantage on attaque d'arme au corps à corpss and test de caractéristiques using Dexterity that involve this arm.

This arm replacement features enhanced strength.

Techie's Pattern (Exquisite).name: Techie's Pattern (Exquisite)
Techie's Pattern (Exquisite).description:
Modification d'objet (vêtements)

Vous gagnez une grande maîtrise de la technologie.

Silver-Tongued Pattern (Fine).name: Silver-Tongued Pattern (Fine)
Silver-Tongued Pattern (Fine).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Deception increases by two steps (to proficient, from trained to expertise, from proficient to mastery, from expertise to high mastery, or from mastery to grand mastery).

Performer's Pattern (Elite).name: Performer's Pattern (Elite)
Performer's Pattern (Elite).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Performance increases by five steps (to high mastery or from trained to grand mastery).

Versatile Frame (Superior).name: Versatile Frame (Superior)
Versatile Frame (Superior).description:
Item Modification (Vibroweapon)

Prerequisite: Lacks double or two-handed property

This weapon gains the versatile ([[/r 1d12]]) property. If it already has the versatile property, the versatile dégâts increases by two steps (from [[/r 2d4]] to [[/r d12]], [[/r d10]] to [[/r 2d6]], from [[/r d12]] to [[/r 3d4]], or from [[/r 2d6]] to [[/r 3d4]]).

Crossguard Hilt (Superior).name: Crossguard Hilt (Superior)
Crossguard Hilt (Superior).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme gagne la propriété défensive 2. S'il possède déjà la propriété défensive, son numéro défensif augmente de 2, jusqu'à un maximum de 3.

Threatening Pattern (Choice).name: Threatening Pattern (Choice)
Threatening Pattern (Choice).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Intimidation increases by four steps (to mastery, from trained to high mastery, or from proficient to grand mastery).

Armament and Defense Library.name: Bibliothèque d'armement et de défense
Armament and Defense Library.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

Prerequisite: Intelligence 13

You gain maîtrise in all simple and martial weapons, all armor, and the Piloting skill. De plus, quand vous faites an test d'Intelligence to recall or discern information about a weapon, piece of armor, or a military vehicle that this library contains information on, you are considered proficient in the check.

Side Effect: This aggressively effective library can make it difficult to focus in stressful situations. You have disavantage on Constitution jet de sauvegardes to maintain concentration. De plus, you have disavantage on test de caractéristiques while concentrating on a power.

This small and unassuming electronic module installed in the parietal lobe contains a massive library of information pertaining to weapons, armor, droids, and every other defense system known to the galaxy at large. Even rare or obscure pieces of technology are described here, offering a unique perspective on the universe - if you can handle it.

Dexterity Augment (Champion).name: Dexterity Augment  (Champion)
Dexterity Augment (Champion).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Dextérité augmente de 2 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 2.

Returning Weapon Hilt.name: Poignée d'arme de retour
Returning Weapon Hilt.description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme gagne la propriété de retour.

Disintegration Core Mk IV.description:

Cette arme acquiert la propriété de désintégration 16. S'il possède déjà la propriété de désintégration, son nombre de désintégration augmente de 4, jusqu'à un maximum de 18.

Absorptive Reinforcement Mk III.description:

Inconspicuous Shielding.description:

Fortitude Enhancer Mk II.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

Prerequisite: Constitution 13

When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

Side Effect: Quand vous échouez a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, you treat the dégâts as if the source had rolled the maximum.

Stitching Amplifier Mk I.description:

Accuracy Focus Mk IV.description:

Nagai Edge (Exceptional).name: Nagai Edge (Exceptional)
Nagai Edge (Exceptional).description:
Item Modification (Vibroweapon)

When you have avantage on an attack roll you make with this weapon, get the same result on both dice rolls, and hit, you deal three additional weapon dice worth of dégâts.

Repelling Cycler (Flawed).name: Repelling Cycler (Flawed)
Repelling Cycler (Flawed).description:
Item Modification (Focus Generator)

This item gains the repelling property, but the DD to interrupt or dispel your powers is equal to 10 + the power's niveau, or 8 + twice your bonus de maîtrise + your casting modificateur for that power, whichever is greater.

Dispelling Dataport (Fine).name: Dispelling Dataport (Fine)
Dispelling Dataport (Fine).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Ostrine Splitter Mk I.description:
Item Modification (Blaster)

When you deal dégâts with this weapon, you deal an additional [[/r 1d4]] acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or sonic dégâts (chosen by the GM when generating this item).

Smart Interface (Basic).name: Smart Interface (Basic)
Smart Interface (Basic).description:
Modification d'objet (Blaster)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété intelligente (15, +2). S'il possède déjà la propriété intelligente, ses numéros intelligents augmentent respectivement de +1 et +1, jusqu'à un maximum de 20 et +6.

Forged Ferricite Mastery Channel.name: Forged Ferricite Mastery Channel
Forged Ferricite Mastery Channel.description:
Item Modification (Focus Generator)

When you cast a pouvoir de la Force of 1st-niveau or higher that deals dégâts, you can increase the dégâts by one and a half times (rounded down) the number of point de Forces spent.

Withering Channel (Mastery).name: Withering Channel (Mastery)
Withering Channel (Mastery).description:
Modification d'objet (Générateur de focus)

.

Stealthy Pattern (Favored).description:

Your level of maîtrise in Stealth increases by three steps (to expertise, from trained to mastery, from proficient to high mastery, or from expertise to grand mastery).

Nighthawk Ocular Implant.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

Prerequisite: Intelligence 13

This augmentation replaces your eyes.

You can activate or deactivate this implant as a action bonus. While active, you gain darkvision to a range of 120 mètres.

Side Effect: While active and in bright light, you have disavantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

Withercasting Overlay (Novice).description:

Scholar Defensive Augment.description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Prerequisite: At least 3 niveaus in scholar

Vous apprenez un supplémentaire discovery. When you complete a repos long, you can change this discovery for a different option available to you.

Integrated Subdermal Armor.name: Armure sous-cutanée intégrée
Integrated Subdermal Armor.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

When you aren't wearing armor, your AC becomes 13 + your Dexterity modificateur.

Side Effect: Each time you take dégâts while you aren't wearing armor, your speed decreases by 5 mètres jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

This implant reinforces your skin with an ablative woven alloy, making you difficult to dégâts.

Item Modification (Armor)

Prerequisite: Armor

This armor has a jetpack built in. Activating or deactivating the jetpack requires a action bonus and, while active, you have a flying speed of 30 mètres. The jetpack last pendant 1 minute per power cell (to a maximum of 10 minutes) and can be recharged by a power source or replacing the power cells.

Powered Armoring Mk III.description:

.

Corruption Crystal (Adept).description:

Withercasting Underlay Mk III.description:

Fadecasting Underlay Mk II.name: Fadecasting Underlay Mk II
Fadecasting Underlay Mk II.description:
Modification d'objet (Armure)

En utilisant cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 à la sauvegarde technologique DD des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Force ou de Constitution.

Constitution Augment (Exceptional).name: Constitution Augment (Exceptional)
Constitution Augment (Exceptional).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Constitution augmente de 2 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 1.

Smart Interface (Improved).name: Smart Interface (Improved)
Smart Interface (Improved).description:
Modification d'objet (Blaster)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété intelligente (17, +3). S'il possède déjà la propriété intelligente, ses numéros intelligents augmentent respectivement de +3 et +2, jusqu'à un maximum de 20 et +6.

Strength Augment (Improved).name: Strength Augment (Improved)
Strength Augment (Improved).description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Your Strength score increases by 1, and your maximum for this score increases by 1. One score de caractéristique other than Strength (chosen by the GM) decreases by 1.

Refocused Subroutine.name: Refocused Subroutine
Refocused Subroutine.description:
Item Modification (Wristpad)

When you are forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration on a power you can use your réaction and spend 2 tech points to automatically succeed on the jet de sauvegarde.

You can only spend a number of tech points in this way equal to your bonus de maîtrise. You regain the ability to do so when you complete a repos long.

You can use Refocused Subroutine even if you have already used a different Subroutine modification during the casting of the power.

Semiauto Core.name: Semiauto Core
Semiauto Core.description:
Modification d'objet (Blaster)

Prérequis : Propriété automatique

Cette arme perd la propriété automatique.

Quickened Subroutine.name: Quickened Subroutine
Quickened Subroutine.description:
Item Modification (Wristpad)

When you cast a power that has a casting time of 1 action, you can spend 2 additional tech points to change the casting time to 1 action bonus for this casting.

You can only spend a number of tech points in this way equal to your bonus de maîtrise. You regain the ability to do so when you complete a repos long.

You can use only one Subroutine modification on a power when you cast it, unless otherwise noted.

Bright Crystal (Adept).name: Bright Crystal (Adept)
Bright Crystal (Adept).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme gagne la propriété Bright 16. S'il possède déjà la propriété lumineuse, son nombre lumineux augmente de 4, jusqu'à un maximum de 18.

Overlay Amplifier (Novice).name: Overlay Amplifier (Novice)
Overlay Amplifier (Novice).description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 aux attaques de force au corps à corps et une pénalité de -1 aux attaques de force à distance.

Ossus Training Lens.name: Ossus Training Lens
Ossus Training Lens.description:
Item Modification (Lightweapon)

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and a -1 penalty to jet de dégâtss made with this weapon.

Aratech Recycler Core Mk II.name: Aratech Recycler Core Mk II
Aratech Recycler Core Mk II.description:
Item Modification (Blaster)

Prerequisite: Burst property

When you use the burst feature of this weapon, vous pouvez choisir to include up to 2 additional creatures within 5 mètres of any affected space to also be affected the burst, if they were not already.

Une fois par tour, when you deal dégâts with this weapon, your walking speed increases by 10 mètres jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, and the dégâtsd creature can't make attaque d'opportunités against you for the rest of your turn.

Fortitude Enhancer Mk III.name: Fortitude Enhancer Mk III
Fortitude Enhancer Mk III.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

Prerequisite: Strength and Constitution 15

When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Strength or Constitution jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

Side Effect: Quand vous échouez a Strength or Constitution jet de sauvegarde, you treat the dégâts as if the source had rolled the maximum.

Withercasting Channel (Training).name: Withercasting Channel (Training)
Withercasting Channel (Training).description:
Modification d'objet (Générateur de Focus)

En utilisant cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 au DD de sauvegarde de force des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Sagesse ou de Charisme et une pénalité de -1 au DD de sauvegarde de force des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Force ou de Constitution.

Extending Motherboard (Basic).name: Extending Motherboard (Basic)
Extending Motherboard (Basic).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Cet objet gagne la propriété d'extension 5. S'il possède déjà la propriété d'extension, son numéro d'extension augmente de 5, jusqu'à un maximum de 30.

Humanoid Replicant.name: Humanoid Replicant
Humanoid Replicant.description:
Personnalisation du droïde (partie)

Condition préalable : proportions humanoïdes

Votre droïde gagne une couche extérieure qui le rend impossible à distinguer d'une espèce de votre choix de même taille. De plus, vous bénéficiez d'un avantage sur les contrôles effectués pour dissimuler votre nature, et les scanners de rareté standard ou inférieure ne parviennent pas automatiquement à déterminer que vous êtes un droïde.

Staggering Oscillator.name: Staggering Oscillator
Staggering Oscillator.description:
Item Modification (Vibroweapon)

Quand vous contactez avec the weapon, you can force la cible to make a DD 13 Strength jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature is pushed back 10 mètres and knocked à terre.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a short or repos long before you can use it again.

Blaster Integration.name: Blaster Integration
Blaster Integration.description:
Personnalisation du droïde (partie)

Vous pouvez désormais intégrer un seul blaster simple ou martial dans votre châssis de droïde. Au cours d'un court ou d'un repos long, vous pouvez insérer et intégrer ce blaster dans votre cadre. En guise de bonus d'action, vous pouvez ouvrir ou fermer une petite trappe située quelque part sur le corps de votre droïde, vous permettant de manier et de tirer normalement avec l'arme lorsque vous souhaitez attaquer avec. Tant que la trappe est ouverte, vos mains ne sont pas considérées comme occupées par ce blaster. Toutes les autres règles et conditions s'appliquent normalement comme si vous maniiez ce blaster à une ou deux mains (votre choix).

Piercing Oscillator (Devastating).name: Piercing Oscillator (Devastating)
Piercing Oscillator (Devastating).description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété perforante 3. S'il possède déjà la propriété de perçage, son numéro de perçage passe à 3.

Impermeable Overlay Mk V.name: Impermeable Overlay Mk V
Impermeable Overlay Mk V.description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Prérequis : Armure

Cette armure acquiert la propriété imperméable 8 (combinaisons choisies par le MJ). S'il possède déjà la propriété imperméable, son indice d'imperméabilité augmente de 8, jusqu'à un maximum de 9.

Precision Chamber Mk III.name: Precision Chamber Mk III
Precision Chamber Mk III.description:
Modification d'objet (Blaster)

La portée de cette arme augmente de 30/120.

Emergency Landing Braces.name: Emergency Landing Braces
Emergency Landing Braces.description:
Item Modification (Armor)

You can use your réaction to reduce any falling dégâts you would take by half.

Channeling Amplifier (Mastery).description:

Modification d'objet (Blaster)

Venomous Oscillator.name: Venomous Oscillator
Venomous Oscillator.description:
Item Modification (Vibroweapon)

As a action bonus, you can coat this weapon in a thin layer of poison pendant 1 minute. The next time you hit with the weapon, la créature must make a DD 15 Constitution jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d10]] poison dégâts and becomes empoisonné pendant 1 minute.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

Dexterity Augment (Basic).name: Dexterity Augment (Basic)
Dexterity Augment (Basic).description:

Monk Defensive Augment.description:

Vous gagnez une option de vœu monastique.

Bansche Advanced 2ZBc.name: Bansche Advanced 2ZBc
Bansche Advanced 2ZBc.description:

When you spend tech points and deal dégâts with a pouvoir technique cast through this wristpad, you deal additional dégâts equal to the number of tech points spent.

Magnetized Shield.name: Magnetized Shield
Magnetized Shield.description:

Monk Offensive Augment.name: Monk Offensive Augment
Monk Offensive Augment.description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Prerequisite: At least 3 niveaus in monk

When you roll a 1 on the jet de dégâts for an unarmed strike or monk weapon, you can reroll the die. You must use the new roll.

Integrated Subdermal Armor Mk II.name: Armure sous-cutanée intégrée Mk II
Integrated Subdermal Armor Mk II.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

When you aren't wearing armor, your AC becomes 14 + your Dexterity modificateur.

Side Effect: Each time you take dégâts while you aren't wearing armor, your speed decreases by 5 mètres jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

This implant reinforces your skin with a high-strength cortosis reinforcement, making you very difficult to dégâts.

Disguised Hilt.name: Disguised Hilt
Disguised Hilt.description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme gagne la propriété déguisée.

Bioenhancement Matrix Mk III.description:

Votre point de vie maximum augmente d'un montant égal à trois fois votre niveau, et il augmente de 3 à chaque fois que vous gagnez un niveau.

Stitching Rangefinder Mk I.description:

Oscillating Rangefinder Mk II.description:

Stealthy Pattern (Exquisite).description:

Storing Emitter (Improved).name: Storing Emitter (Improved)
Storing Emitter (Improved).description:
Modification d'objet (Générateur de focus)

Cet objet gagne la propriété de stockage 3. S'il possède déjà la propriété de stockage, son numéro de stockage augmente de 3, jusqu'à un maximum de 6.

Hydraulic Equalizer Mk V.name: Hydraulic Equalizer Mk V
Hydraulic Equalizer Mk V.description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Le numéro de force de cette armure ou bouclier est réduit de cinq niveaux (de 21 à 11). Si le nombre de résistance est égal ou inférieur à 19, cette modification supprime entièrement la propriété de résistance.

Fadecasting Crystal (Fighting).name: Fadecasting Crystal (Fighting)
Fadecasting Crystal (Fighting).description:
Modification d'objet (Arme légère)

En utilisant cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 à la sauvegarde de force DD des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Force ou de Constitution.

Expanding Conductor (Improved).name: Expanding Conductor (Improved)
Expanding Conductor (Improved).description:

Stabilizer Mastery Cell.name: Stabilizer Mastery Cell
Stabilizer Mastery Cell.description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Le numéro de dextérité de cette arme est réduit de quatre niveaux (de 21 à 13 ou de 19 à 11). Si le numéro de dextérité est égal ou inférieur à 17, cette modification supprime entièrement la propriété de dextérité.

Adegan Crystal (Chipped).name: Adegan Crystal (Chipped)
Adegan Crystal (Chipped).description:
Item Modification (Lightweapon)

You gain a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss made with this weapon.

Regulated Reinforcement.name: Regulated Reinforcement
Regulated Reinforcement.description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Cette armure ou ce bouclier acquiert la propriété réglementée.

Vicious Ascendancy Hilt.name: Vicious Ascendancy Hilt
Vicious Ascendancy Hilt.description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété vicieuse 3. S'il possède déjà la propriété vicieuse, son numéro vicieux passe à 3.

Crystalizing Rangefinder (Fighting).description:

Vous apprenez un supplémentaire Guardian Aura option, and the radius of your Guardian Auras increases by 5 mètres.

Biting Crystal (Ancient).name: Biting Crystal (Ancient)
Biting Crystal (Ancient).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété mordante 18. S'il possède déjà la propriété mordante, son numéro mordant passe à 18.

Neuralizing Oscillator Mk III.name: Neuralizing Oscillator Mk III
Neuralizing Oscillator Mk III.description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété neuralisante 15. S'il possède déjà la propriété neuralisante, son nombre neuralisant augmente de 3, jusqu'à un maximum de 18.

Clandestine Stitching (Superior).name: Clandestine Stitching (Superior)
Clandestine Stitching (Superior).description:
Modification d'article (vêtements)

Cet article de vêtement est livré avec quatre poches cachées, chacune pouvant stocker jusqu'à 1 lb. Trouver ces poches cachées nécessite un contrôle d'enquête DD 24.

Berserker Offensive Augment.name: Berserker Offensive Augment
Berserker Offensive Augment.description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Prerequisite: At least 3 niveaus in berserker

Your Rage dégâts bonus increases by 1, and when you score a critical hit, you can roll one additional weapon dégâts die and add the result to the total.

Reflex Enhancer Mk I.name: Reflex Enhancer Mk I
Reflex Enhancer Mk I.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Enhancement)

Prerequisite: Intelligence 13

When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Intelligence jet de sauvegarde to take only half dégâts, you instead take no dégâts si vous réussissez on a jet de sauvegarde, and only half dégâts si vous échouez.

Side Effect: Quand vous échouez a Intelligence jet de sauvegarde, you treat the dégâts as if the source had rolled the maximum.

Vicious Mastery Guard.name: Vicious Mastery Guard
Vicious Mastery Guard.description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété vicieuse 2. S'il possède déjà la propriété vicieuse, son nombre vicieux augmente de 2, jusqu'à un maximum de 3.

Inlay Amplifier (Journeyman).name: Inlay Amplifier (Journeyman)
Inlay Amplifier (Journeyman).description:
Modification d'objet (vêtements)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +2 aux attaques de force en mêlée.

Expanding Amplifier (Basic).name: Expanding Amplifier (Basic)
Expanding Amplifier (Basic).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Cet objet gagne la propriété d'expansion 5. S'il possède déjà la propriété d'expansion, son nombre d'expansion augmente de 5, jusqu'à un maximum de 30.

Returning Weapon Guard.name: Garde d'arme de retour
Returning Weapon Guard.description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Prérequis : propriété lancée

Cette arme gagne la propriété de retour.

Wisdom Weave (Fine).name: Wisdom Weave (Fine)
Wisdom Weave (Fine).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Wisdom jet de sauvegardes increases by one step (to trained, from trained to proficient, from proficient to expertise, from expertise to mastery, from mastery to high mastery, or from high mastery to grand mastery).

Intelligence Augment (Basic).name: Intelligence Augment (Basic)
Intelligence Augment (Basic).description:
Item Modification (Augment)

Your Intelligence score increases by 1. One score de caractéristique other than Intelligence (chosen by the GM) decreases by 1.

Telgorn Jolt Stabilizer (Improved).name: Telgorn Jolt Stabilizer (Improved)
Telgorn Jolt Stabilizer (Improved).description:
Item Modification (Lightweapon)

When you cast a pouvoir de la Force or use a class feature that requires a attaque d'arme au corps à corps, you can spend 1 point de Force to change the weapon's type de dégâts to lightning and deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts.

Enlarging Processor (Excellent).name: Enlarging Processor (Excellent)
Enlarging Processor (Excellent).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Cet objet gagne la propriété d'agrandissement 20. S'il possède déjà la propriété d'agrandissement, son nombre d'agrandissement augmente de 20, jusqu'à un maximum de 30.

Channeling Amplifier (Training).name: Channeling Amplifier (Training)
Channeling Amplifier (Training).description:
Modification d'objet (générateur de focus)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 aux attaques de force en mêlée et une pénalité de -1 aux attaques de force à distance.

Versatile Shielding Mk III.name: Versatile Shielding Mk III
Versatile Shielding Mk III.description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Prérequis : Bouclier

Ce bouclier acquiert la propriété polyvalente 3. S'il possède déjà la propriété polyvalente, son nombre polyvalent passe à 3.

Insulated Reinforcement (Superior).name: Insulated Reinforcement (Superior)
Insulated Reinforcement (Superior).description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Cette armure ou bouclier acquiert la propriété isolée 8. S'il possède déjà la propriété isolée, son numéro isolé augmente de 4, jusqu'à un maximum de 10.

Naturalist's Pattern (Elite).name: Naturalist's Pattern (Elite)
Naturalist's Pattern (Elite).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Nature increases by five steps (to high mastery or from trained to grand mastery).

Performer's Pattern (Basic).name: Performer's Pattern (Basic)
Performer's Pattern (Basic).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Performance increases by one step (to trained, from trained to proficient, from proficient to expertise, from expertise to mastery, from mastery to high mastery, or from high mastery to grand mastery).

Charisma Augment (Superior).name: Charisma Augment (Superior)
Charisma Augment (Superior).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Charisme augmente de 1 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 1.

Extending Motherboard (Improved).name: Extending Motherboard (Improved)
Extending Motherboard (Improved).description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Cet objet gagne la propriété d'extension 15. S'il possède déjà la propriété d'extension, son numéro d'extension augmente de 15, jusqu'à un maximum de 30.

Pacnorval Chem Integrator.name: Pacnorval Chem Integrator
Pacnorval Chem Integrator.description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Vous pouvez appliquer des poisons à cette arme en tant que bonus d'action, au lieu d'une action.

Charmer's Pattern (Choice).name: Charmer's Pattern (Choice)
Charmer's Pattern (Choice).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Persuasion increases by four steps (to mastery, from trained to high mastery, or from proficient to grand mastery).

Strength Weave (Improved).name: Strength Weave (Improved)
Strength Weave (Improved).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Strength jet de sauvegardes increases by two steps (to proficient, from trained to expertise, from proficient to mastery, from expertise to high mastery, or from mastery to grand mastery).

Throwing Weapon Hilt (Exceptional).name: Poignée d'arme de lancer (exceptionnel)
Throwing Weapon Hilt (Exceptional).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Cette arme acquiert la propriété de lancer (50/150). S'il possède déjà la propriété lancé, la portée augmente de 25/75.

Impermeable Overlay Mk IV.name: Impermeable Overlay Mk IV
Impermeable Overlay Mk IV.description:
Modification d'objet (armure)

Prérequis : Armure

Cette armure acquiert la propriété imperméable 6 (combinaisons choisies par le MJ). S'il possède déjà la propriété imperméable, son indice d'imperméabilité augmente de 6, jusqu'à un maximum de 9.

Constitution Emitter (Basic).name: Constitution Emitter (Basic)
Constitution Emitter (Basic).description:
Modification d'objet (Générateur de focus)

Le numéro de constitution de cet objet est réduit d'un cran (de 21 à 19, de 19 à 17, de 17 à 15, de 15 à 13 ou de 13 à 11). Si le numéro de constitution est 11, cette modification lui supprime entièrement la propriété de constitution.

Silver-Tongued Pattern (Favored).name: Silver-Tongued Pattern (Favored)
Silver-Tongued Pattern (Favored).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Deception increases by three steps (to expertise, from trained to mastery, from proficient to high mastery, or from expertise to grand mastery).

Siege Weapon.name: Arme de siège
Siege Weapon.description:
Item Modification (Blaster)

You modify this weapon to be more effective against barriers. The weapon deals double dégâts against structures.

Dexterity Augment (Exceptional).name: Dexterity Augment (Exceptional)
Dexterity Augment (Exceptional).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Dextérité augmente de 2 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 1.

Withercasting Overlay (Adept).name: Withercasting Overlay (Adept)
Withercasting Overlay (Adept).description:
Modification d'objet (Armure)

En utilisant cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +3 au DD de sauvegarde de force des pouvoirs qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Sagesse ou de Charisme.

Ostrine Crystal (Perfect).name: Ostrine Crystal (Perfect)
Ostrine Crystal (Perfect).description:
Item Modification (Lightweapon)

When you deal dégâts with this weapon, you deal an additional [[/r 1d8]] force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, or sonic dégâts (chosen by the GM when generating this item).

Mitigating Processor Mk II.name: Mitigating Processor Mk II
Mitigating Processor Mk II.description:
Modification d'objet (poignet)

Cet objet gagne la propriété atténuante 2. S'il possède déjà la propriété atténuante, son numéro atténuant augmente de 2, jusqu'à un maximum de 6.

Defensive Guard.name: Defensive Guard
Defensive Guard.description:
Modification d'objet (Vibroweapon)

Cette arme gagne la propriété défensive 1. S'il possède déjà la propriété défensive, son numéro défensif augmente de 1, jusqu'à un maximum de 3.

Constitution Augment (Champion).name: Constitution Augment (Champion)
Constitution Augment (Champion).description:
Modification d'objet (augmentation)

Votre score de Constitution augmente de 2 et votre maximum pour ce score augmente de 2.

Stitching Rangefinder Mk II.name: Stitching Rangefinder Mk II
Stitching Rangefinder Mk II.description:
Modification d'objet (vêtements)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 aux attaques technologiques à distance.

High-Grade Cybernetic Legs.name: High-Grade Cybernetic Legs
High-Grade Cybernetic Legs.description:
Cybernetic Augmentation (Replacement)

Prerequisite: Constitution 13

This augmentation replaces both legs.

You gain avantage on Strength test de caractéristiques and Strength jet de sauvegardes, you can make a running long jump or a running high jump after moving only 5 mètres on foot, rather than 10 mètres, and your speed increases by 10 mètres.

Side Effect: Your powerful legs have difficulty moving quietly. You have disavantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks that rely on moving silently.

This mechanical leg replacement increases speed and jumping height.

Threatening Pattern (Favored).name: Threatening Pattern (Favored)
Threatening Pattern (Favored).description:
Item Modification (Clothing)

Your level of maîtrise in Intimidation increases by three steps (to expertise, from trained to mastery, from proficient to high mastery, or from expertise to grand mastery).

Crystalizing Amplifier (Dueling).name: Crystalizing Amplifier (Dueling)
Crystalizing Amplifier (Dueling).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +2 aux attaques de force en mêlée.

Crystalizing Rangefinder (Dueling).name: Crystalizing Rangefinder (Dueling)
Crystalizing Rangefinder (Dueling).description:
Modification d'objet (arme légère)

Lorsque vous utilisez cet objet comme focus, vous gagnez un bonus de +2 aux attaques de force à distance.

Artificially Intelligent.name: Artificially Intelligent
Artificially Intelligent.description:
Item Modification (Armor)

Prerequisite: Armor

You install an artificial intelligence into this armor. While wearing this armor, quand vous faites an test de caractéristique, this armor's artificial intelligence can take the Help action.

You can use this feature twice. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.
